user_goal_stage: The user is currently on the main news page, but a 'Welcome' popup is blocking interaction. The goal of adding a personalized news topic hasn't been started yet.
action_plan: First, I will dismiss the 'Welcome to the news site!' popup by clicking the 'Continue' button. Then, I will navigate to the personalized news section by clicking the 'Go To Personalized News' button. Once there, I will look for the input field to add 'Healthcare Advances in 2024' as a personalized news topic and then click the add/save button.
